events.name: Launch
events.description: SLS launches from Kennedy Space Center LC-39B

events.name: Max-Q
events.description: Maximum aerodynamic pressure on the vehicle (~T+1:15)

events.name: SRB Separation
events.description: Solid Rocket Boosters separate from core stage (T+2:08)

events.name: Core Stage Separation
events.description: SLS core stage main engine cutoff and separation (T+8:06)

events.name: Translunar Injection
events.description: ICPS burn sends Orion onto a translunar trajectory (~T+1:37)

events.name: ICPS Separation
events.description: Interim Cryogenic Propulsion Stage separates from Orion (T+3:24)

events.name: Lunar Sphere of Influence
events.description: Orion enters the Moon's gravitational sphere of influence (~T+4d 6:59)

events.name: Lunar Flyby
events.description: Closest approach to the Moon, ~4,100–4,600 miles beyond the far side (~T+5d 1:23)

events.name: Entry Interface
events.description: Orion enters Earth's atmosphere at ~400,000 ft altitude (~T+9d 1:33)

events.name: Splashdown
events.description: Orion splashes down in the Pacific Ocean (~T+9d 1:46)
